name: Plunger
author: Poki
description: Plunge your way through challenging levels in Plunger! In this action puzzle game made by Nitrome, you play as a little robot named Plunger. Using his long arms, Plunger can only move vertically or horizontally. With just this limited amount of movement, Plunger will have to make their way through many different obstacles and enemies. Each level has a series of nodes in them. Connect them all up to turn them into gold and open the exit! There's 24 different levels to play - can you beat them all? How to play Plunger? Use W and S to move vertically Use A and D to move horizantally Who created Plunger? Plunger is created by Nitrome. Play their other games on Poki: Bad Ice-Cream , Double Edged and Dangle How can I play Plunger for free? You can play Plunger for free on Poki. Can I play Plunger on mobile devices and desktop? Plunger can be played on your computer only.
